page.title: Home
page.hero: Gentle, playful pediatric occupational therapy in Tacoma's Proctor District.
page.intro: We help children build the everyday skills that let them play, learn, and thrive, from handwriting and fine motor to sensory processing and self regulation.

page.title: Services
page.service: Individual sessions for children who are over or under responsive to everyday input.
Playful, graded activities that build the hand skills used for writing and self care.
Supportive, no pressure strategies for cautious eaters.
Simple home programs so progress carries over between visits.

page.title: About Jennifer
page.bio: Jennifer Long is a pediatric occupational therapist and the sole owner of the practice. She holds a Master of Occupational Therapy and has built her practice around team based, family centered care.
page.value: Read the child before the checklist.

page.title: Parent Resources
page.resource: Five simple activities that need no special equipment.
Calming input that helps with focus.
A forty activity guide for parents and therapists, in progress for release.

page.title: Contact
page.waitNote: Current average wait for a new evaluation is about three weeks.

insurance.accepted: Premera, Regence, Tricare, Pacific Health Partners

settings.hours: Monday to Friday, 8:30 AM to 4:30 PM
